definition.name: Composition-rule
definition.definition: The 2x2 matrix M_r^L = [[A_r^L, B_r^L], [A_{r-1}^L, B_{r-1}^L]] satisfies M_{r+s}^L = M_s^{L+r} * M_r^L. In Hadamard-product form: A_{r+s}^L = A_s^{L+r} (.) A_r^L + B_s^{L+r} (.) A_{r-1}^L, and analogously for B (paper line 981, label eq:composition; line 1025 eq:rs-product).
